atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right middle finger four days after a motor vehicle accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as sharp and constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as exacerbated by pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain started immediately after the accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain has not improved with rest or ice.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a small bump on his forehead.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is embarrassed to discuss the circumstances surrounding the accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any other injuries or symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right middle finger demonstrates limited range of motion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a finger splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every 6 hours.
